Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff David Tsao
Off Calendar Nov-03-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Ilene M. Hochstein, Esq. (650.877.8288; ilene@hochsteinlaw.net) for Plaintiff.
Houman Chitsaz, Esq. (415.306.5560; houman@ncalegal.com) of Nardell Chitsaz & Associates LLP for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS PANDORA KARAOKE, INC., TIMMY CHOY and JEFFREY NG's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff David Tsao is GRANTED in and DENIED in part. Defendant's request re: special interrogatories is GRANTED. Defendant's request re: form interrogatories is DENIED without prejudice. Sanctions DENIED.

Mr. Chitsaz to circulate a proposed order for approval as to form then submit to JPT via email at williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
